herbs.herb_desc: The Aesculus hippocastanum tablet, also known as the Horse Chestnut tablet, is a herbal supplement made from the bark and leaves of the Aesculus hippocastanum tree. It is commonly used to support venous health and alleviate symptoms associated with varicose veins, such as swelling and pain. However, it is essential to consult a healthcare professional before taking the Aesculus hippocastanum tablet, as it may interact with certain medications or exacerbate underlying health conditions.

Allium sativum, commonly known as garlic, is a widely used herb in traditional medicine, including its tablet form. The tablet form of Allium sativum is often used to aid in digestion, lower cholesterol levels, and boost the immune system. However, it is essential to consult a healthcare professional before using Allium sativum tablets, as they may interact with certain medications or have adverse effects in individuals with certain medical conditions.
